title: We Give You Thanks, O God

verses.text: We give you thanks, O God, Because your name is near. We give you thanks for all your works Your wondrous deeds declare.
You say, “I set the time; I judge with even hand; When earth and all its people quake, I make its pillars stand.
“‘Boast not’ I tell the proud; To vile men, ‘Lift no horn.’ Do not lift up your horn on high Or speak with haughty scorn.”
For lifting up comes not from east or west or south; But God is judge; he raises one And puts another down.
The Lord’s hand holds a cup With foaming wine, well-mixed; He pours it out, and wicked ones Must drink it to the dregs.
But I fore’er proclaim, And Jacob’s God I’ll praise. The wicked’s horns I will cut off, The righteous I will raise.
